title: Photographs taken near the Paraguay River revealed 3 stationary UFOs [1980]

text_preview: DEC, 12th, 1980. Assunção, Paraguai / and Paranaguá, State of Paraná, Brazil. A man sent photos taken by a friend [see photos of case in ARX.0.0.202] when they were on a tour in Paraguay, at a location about 12 km from the capital Asunción. According to the man’s report, a resident of Paranaguá, State of Paraná, with his friend were waiting for a boat to take them to the indigenous territory of the Maku People and before going, they decided to gather people to take some pictures of the group. Some pictures were taken and when they were developed they noticed three unidentified flying objects.
summary: Photographs taken near the Paraguay River in Dec 1980 revealed three stationary UFOs; a second witness later observed three craft flying in formation over indigenous Maku territory.
